SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-04-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2015 - JUDGMENT.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,225.00 FILED BY KANG, SHIN HAN DRIVER AND REGISTERED OWNER AS TO DEFENDANT ALMASAMREH, AYMAN T ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-04-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
